items.title: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output (Webhooks) leading to Arbitrary Code Execution
items.summary: A critical vulnerability in Adobe Commerce's webhooks functionality allows arbitrary code execution due to improper output encoding or escaping, requiring no user interaction.

items.title: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type leading to Privilege Escalation
items.summary: This critical vulnerability allows an attacker to upload dangerous file types, potentially leading to privilege escalation and arbitrary code execution, though it requires user interaction.

items.title: Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) leading to Privilege Escalation
items.summary: A critical stored XSS vulnerability allows a privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts, potentially leading to privilege escalation or arbitrary code execution.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization leading to Security Feature Bypass
items.summary: This critical incorrect authorization vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized read and write access without user interaction.

items.title: Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) (B2B) leading to Privilege Escalation
items.summary: A critical stored XSS vulnerability, specifically affecting B2B deployments, allows a privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts, potentially leading to privilege escalation or arbitrary code execution.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization leading to Security Feature Bypass
items.summary: A high-severity incorrect authorization vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized read and write access without user interaction.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization leading to Security Feature Bypass
items.summary: This high-severity incorrect authorization vulnerability allows a high-privileged attacker to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized read access.

items.title: Improper Input Validation (SQL Injection) leading to Arbitrary Code Execution
items.summary: A high-severity improper input validation vulnerability, specifically an SQL Injection, could allow a high-privileged attacker to execute arbitrary code.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in the Mirasvit Cache Warmer extension allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization Bypass
items.summary: A high-severity incorrect authorization flaw allows remote, unauthenticated attackers to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access in Adobe Commerce. [cite: 17 in previous step]

items.title: PolyShell: Unauthenticated Unrestricted File Upload to Remote Code Execution
items.summary: A critical vulnerability, dubbed PolyShell, allows unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary executable files via the REST API, potentially leading to remote code execution on affected Magento and Adobe Commerce stores.
